name: Slackline.GitHub.io
body:
### Slackline on Github

Welcome, I'm a statistician who enjoys coding in [R](https://www.r-project.org/).  When I'm not working I enjoy [climbing](https://www.flickr.com/photos/slackline/albums/558545), [photography](https://www.flickr.com/photos/slackline/) and playing around with [Gentoo Linux](https://www.gentoo.org/).
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
